title: Tanglr
description: A time-tangling time-travel based redstone mod
body:
# Tanglr
![A banner saying "Made for ModFest 1.21". It features the ModFest 1.21 icon, which has a fox tail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6f3fb3ce69f85362729a6a440aa295b44514ae1_0.webp)
Bend your brain and bend your time with Tanglr! Tanglr features a special Time Tanglr Clock, which allows you to travel exactly 100 years into the future. Whilst in the future, grab whatever you want! Be careful though. If you edit the past, things might no longer be in the correct place for you to have grabbed them in the future.

Once you've wrapped your head around time travel. Why not use it as a redstone component? Use the delayed repeater, which has a delay of exactly 100 years, in combination with the time mover, which can move blocks 100 years into the past, in order to make your contraptions come to live!
